name: Backtest Remote
description: Submit and manage backtests on the remote Findoo Backtest Agent (fep v1.1). Use when the user wants to run a strategy backtest, check status, or fetch reports.

baseUrl.description: Backtest API base URL (e.g. http://150.109.16.195:8000). No trailing slash.

apiKey.description: API key for X-API-Key header. Leave empty for local dev (server may skip auth).
